editor.label: Database host (optional)
editor.description: Localhost mode only: a specific DB host/IP. Blank = this server's MySQL.

editor.label: Max execution time (s)
editor.description: Timeout for long imports, in seconds.

editor.label: Allow blank-password logins
editor.description: Permit connecting with a MySQL account that has no password.

script.name: Configure phpMyAdmin (env + HTTPS)
script.description: Applies the owner's config.json settings (Service.Variables) as phpMyAdmin env vars + a self-signed HTTPS cert on container build. Restores dac_override/fowner/fsetid so the image's /etc/phpmyadmin bootstrap works.
